---
title: "get_order"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_order()`

Get Single Order

## Usage

```r
get_order(order_id, kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API", demo = FALSE)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `order_id` | Character. The order ID. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with complete order details.

## Description

Retrieves details for a specific order by ID.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
order <- get_order("order-uuid")
order$status

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other trading: 
`amend_order()`,
`batch_cancel_orders()`,
`batch_create_orders()`,
`cancel_all_orders()`,
`cancel_order()`,
`create_order()`,
`decrease_order()`
